coords.lm1: navigate       {coord} — t1 views task, p3 views pipeline, d5-d8 range
coords.lm2: edit-field     e1{coord} {f} {v} — set field by number (e.g. e1t3 status done)
coords.lm3: edit-body      e1{coord} B+ {text} — B replaces, B+ appends, B5 line 5, B.Section heading
coords.lm4: create         e2 {ns} "title" — create in namespace (e.g. e2 t "fix bug")
coords.lm6: orchestrate    e0 — sweep pipelines, check gates, auto-kick
coords.lm7: launch         e0 t{n} — launch pipeline from task (auto-create + dispatch)
coords.lm8: pipe-status    e0 p{n} — pipeline state, or e0 p{n} archive/complete/block
coords.lm9: phase2         e0 p{n} phase2 — create Phase 2 direction scaffold (auto-named, auto-placed)
coords.lm10: pipe-list      e0 l — list all pipelines with current states
coords.lm11: diff           .d — what changed since last .a anchor
coords.lm12: anchor         .a — reset diff baseline to now
coords.lm14: filter-since   --since {d} — only entries from last {d} days
coords.lm16: mem-search     memory_search("{q}") — semantic search over memory
